dispositions.name: Purge the Foe
dispositions.description: Kill-focused mission — rewards high DPS, trading efficiency, threat range

dispositions.name: Take and Hold
dispositions.description: Objective-focused mission — rewards durability, OC, mobility for board control

dispositions.name: Reconnaissance
dispositions.description: Mobility and positioning focused — rewards speed, infiltration, deep strike

dispositions.name: Priority Assets
dispositions.description: Balanced with assassination focus — rewards efficient trading and character kills

dispositions.name: Disruption
dispositions.description: Deny and control focused — rewards battleshock, area denial, movement blocking

rules.one_disposition_per_detachment: Each detachment enables exactly one disposition. A detachment's disposition is defined in its faction pack.
rules.mission_alignment: Your army must include at least one detachment whose disposition matches your chosen mission. If no detachment matches, your army is unaligned (no mission bonus).
rules.detachment_points: Detachment Point (DP) costs vary by detachment. Total DP across all detachments cannot exceed the game size's max_dp.

reconnaissance.note: Effectively dead per Mordian Glory community consensus (July 2026)

meta_bias.note: This bias expires if GW releases a new GT Mission Pack
